chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C. P. No. D–287 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 15.08.2024 Mr. Abdul Ahad, Advocate for the petitioner a/w Mr. Muhammad Kashif Advocate. Mr. Talha Abbasi, Advocate for DHA. Mr. Abdul Qadeer Naich, Advocate for FWO. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, D.A.G..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. The subject of the controversy is carved out under Public and Private Right of Way Policy Directive and the rules have now been framed. Copy of such notification is filed and placed on record. In view of such notification, learned counsel for the petitioner does not press this petition as the purpose has been served. Dismissed as not pressed. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Asif
